subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-04-08
subcodes.first_line: Of what use is good health to me? I want to wholly sacrifice myself... I wish the end of my life to be musk-laden. That is, I wish to drink from the chalice of martyrdom
subcodes.first_line_orig: من حالم خوبست مرضی در کار نیست فقط اعصاب است ... امیدوارم خاتمه حیاتم چون مشک معطر
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
